body:
This PR exposes the interpolation method to the users, so that they can change from `Intp.Linear()` to `Intp.Constant()` for example.

TODO

- [x] Update documentation
- [x] Make tests for interpolation method
title: Expose interpolation method to users

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
The InterpolationsRegridder tests have been checking that the maximum difference between regridded and reference values is below a threshold, but without taking the absolute value of the difference. This led tests to pass when they should have failed.

Closes #175


## Content
- [x] take absolute value of difference in tests
- [x] use longitude on [-180, 180] instead of [0, 360] for comparison with ClimaCore coordinates
- [x] check that values at lon=180 are the same as lon=-180 with periodic boundary conditions
title: fix tests for longitude regridding
